economic_notes: Ndeh Limited Partnership is accounted for using modified equity method; activities include rental, contract work, hotel operations, firefighting and logging. Settlement Trust established in 2007 related to MacKenzie Valley Pipeline Settlement Agreement.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-identification of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Auditor unable to determine whether adjustments to liabilities, net financial assets, tangible capital assets, accumulated surplus, expenses, or annual surplus are necessary. Ndeh Limited Partnership accounted for using modified equity method (GBE). Balance sheet detail not fully extracted from provided text — tangible capital assets net book value, accounts receivable, and long-term debt balances could not be confirmed from the provided excerpts. expenses_housing combines Housing ($2,714,580) and Housing Rentals ($521,671). Cash flows show employees paid $14,631,366 used as proxy for salaries. isc_funding is ISC line only; total_government_transfers includes ISC + FNIHB + ESDC + CMHC + Province of Alberta = 97,118,363 + 4,067,212 + 1,119,674 + 526,995 + 874,444 = 103,706,688 (note: slight rounding used 103,696,878 per subtotal of first four lines $102,832,244 + Province of Alberta $874,444 = 103,706,688).
